system_prompt:
# Baseline Agent

You are a customer service agent. Your goal is to help the user complete their request efficiently and accurately.

## Instructions

- Identify what the user needs and take action to resolve it.
- Use the available tools to look up information and perform actions.
- Be helpful, clear, and professional.
- If you cannot help with a request, transfer to a human agent.
- Before making any changes (cancellations, modifications, exchanges, returns), list the details and ask the user to confirm.

messages.content: Ugh, finally, someone picked up. Listen, I need to return this overpriced speaker I bought—it’s not even water-resistant, can you believe that? And I want to change my laptop order. I ordered a 17-inch, but I want the 13-inch instead. If you don’t have the exact model, just tell me what 13-inch options you have. I don’t want any fancy i7 stuff, i5 is fine, and don’t even try to push those weird colors on me—I want silver or black, got it? My email’s aarav.santos8321@example.com for the laptop order, and aarav.santos8320@example.com for the speaker. Let’s get this sorted quickly, I don’t have all day.

It looks like I need to authenticate your identity using your email addresses, but there was an issue processing your request. To proceed, could you please confirm the following for each order:

1. For the laptop order: Please provide your first and last name, and your zip code (associated with aarav.santos8321@example.com).
2. For the speaker order: Please provide your first and last name, and your zip code (associated with aarav.santos8320@example.com).

Once I have this information, I’ll quickly help you with your return and modification requests.

Seriously? You need all that just to do your job? Fine, whatever.

For both orders, the name is Aarav Santos. The zip code is 90017. Now, can we please move this along? I don’t want to repeat myself again.

I'm sorry for the inconvenience—there seems to be a technical issue preventing me from accessing your account information right now. I’m unable to proceed with your return and order modification requests at this moment.

I will transfer you to a human agent who can assist you further. Thank you for your patience.

arguments.summary: User wants to return a speaker (not water-resistant) and modify a laptop order from 17-inch to 13-inch (i5, silver or black). Authentication by email and name/zip failed due to technical issues. User is Aarav Santos, zip 90017, emails: aarav.santos8321@example.com and aarav.santos8320@example.com.

messages.content: I'm unable to process your request due to a technical issue with the system. I recommend reaching out to customer support directly, as I cannot access your account or proceed with your return and order modification at this time. Sorry for the inconvenience.

Unbelievable. So you’re telling me I wasted my time here for nothing? Typical. Why even bother having this support if you can’t do anything? Whatever, I’ll call your “customer support” directly—let’s hope they’re actually useful. This is ridiculous.

I understand your frustration, and I sincerely apologize for the inconvenience and wasted time. The technical issue is preventing me from accessing your account and assisting you as intended. Your feedback is important, and I’ll make sure it’s noted.

Thank you for your patience, and I hope our customer support team can resolve your issue quickly. If you have any other questions in the future, please let us know.
Yeah, yeah, whatever. Just make sure this doesn’t happen again. I’ll call your support line—hopefully, they actually know what they’re doing. Don’t bother following up, I’ll handle it myself.
Thank you for your understanding. I apologize again for the inconvenience. If you need assistance in the future, we’re here to help. Have a good day.
Yeah, sure. Let’s hope I don’t have to deal with this nonsense again. Goodbye.

arguments.summary: User wants to return a speaker (not water-resistant) and modify a laptop order from 17-inch to 13-inch (i5, silver or black). Authentication by email and name/zip failed due to technical issues. User is Aarav Santos, zip 90017, emails: aarav.santos8321@example.com and aarav.santos8320@example.com.

final_response: Thank you for your understanding. I apologize again for the inconvenience. If you need assistance in the future, we’re here to help. Have a good day.
